prestazioni: Engine swap to a **VW EA888 Gen 3 (CJXB 2.0L TSI)** with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Manley H-beam rods, ARP head studs) and a **Garrett GTX3582R turbo** (1.06 A/R turbine housing) pushing 350whp on **E85 fuel** with a **Precision 4655 injector** setup and **AEM Infinity 7 ECU** for standalone management.

Full **034 Motorsport Stage 3+ drivetrain upgrade** including a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily** (2400lb pressure plate), **034 Motorsport lightweight flywheel**, and **Quaife ATB differential** (85% lock) for the **MQB-based T6.1 platform** (7-speed DSG tuned with **GIAC DSG Stage 2 software**).

Custom **KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers** (3-way adjustable, 80mm stroke) with **034 Motorsport subframe collars**, **H&R 24mm front / 22mm rear anti-roll bars**, and **SuperPro poly bushings** (full chassis refresh) paired with **Brembo GT 6-piston front / 4-piston rear brake kit** (355mm rotors) and **Pagid RS29 pads** for endurance use.
estetica: **Rieger Tuning T6.1 widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser) with **custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap** (PPF-protected) and **Hella Rallye 3000 Supertones** (7-inch, H4 conversion) in **DEPO JDM-style housings**.

**OEM+ VW Racing Line** (R-Line replica) side skirts, rear valance, and **custom 20-inch BBS RS-GT wheels** (8.5J ET35 front / 9.5J ET40 rear) with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** (245/30/20 front, 275/25/20 rear) and **H&R Trak+15 spacers** for flush fitment.

**Interior overhaul** with **Recaro Pole Position seats** (carbon shell, FIA-approved), **Schroth 6-point harnesses**, **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** (350mm, suede), **Alcantara headliner**, and **custom roll cage** (T45 steel, 6-point) by **Sparco Pro2000** with **Vibra-Technics engine mounts** to reduce NVH.
